title: 这个字怎么读？
pinyin: Zhè ge zì zěn me dú?
titleTranslation_en: How Do You Read This Character?
description_uz: «O'qituvchi, bir savol berishim mumkinmi?» — dars paytida o'quvchi va o'qituvchi o'rtasidagi suhbat. Bu dialog savol berish, ieroglif qanday o'qilishini va ma'nosini so'rash, qanday yozilishini o'rganish va tushunganini bildirishni mashq qiladi. Maktab uchun foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Учитель, можно задать вопрос?» — разговор ученика и учителя на уроке. Диалог тренирует, как задать вопрос, спросить, как читается и что значит иероглиф, узнать, как его писать, и сказать, что понял. Полезная школьная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Teacher, may I ask a question?» — a chat between a student and a teacher in class. This dialogue practices asking a question, asking how a character is read and what it means, learning how to write it, and saying you understand. Useful school vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.text_original: 老师，我可以问一个问题吗？
sentences.pinyin: Lǎo shī, wǒ kě yǐ wèn yí ge wèn tí ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Teacher, may I ask a question?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge zì zěn me dú?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you read this character?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 这样写，先写这里，再写这里。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè yàng xiě, xiān xiě zhè lǐ, zài xiě zhè lǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Mana bunday: avval bu yerni yoz, keyin bu yerni.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот так: сначала пиши здесь, потом здесь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Write it like this — first write here, then write here.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kàn dǒng le, xiè xie lǎo shī.
sentences.text_translation_en: I get it now, thank you, teacher.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú kè qi, hái yǒu wèn tí ma?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Méi yǒu le, nín jiǎng de hěn qīng chu.
sentences.text_translation_en: No, you explained it very clearly.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, yǒu wèn tí zài lái wèn wǒ.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, savol bo'lsa yana so'rab kel.
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright, if you have questions, come ask me again.
sentences.speaker: B
